planning_assumptions: Team model: 18 total members — 12 developers, 6 testers.
Total raw effort: 220 dev days + 81 test days.
Estimated calendar duration with recommended team: ~6 weeks.
Module boundaries and timings should be reviewed before committing to delivery contracts.
7 modules identified across 23 features.

assumptions: External third-party laboratory systems or billing payment networks are represented via stubbed web services or mock APIs for the preliminary system version.
The client has active agreements with standard secure transactional SMTP servers and SMS gateways (e.g., Twilio, SendGrid) to run scheduling communication processes.
Patient users possess access to basic web-capable devices (smartphones, personal laptops) to utilize patient portal features.
ai_observations: While the client requested a 'simple website' with only basic functional roles, actual real-world deployment of clinical databases demands high-level technical safety. Therefore, the implementation of dynamic audit records and HIPAA constraints is injected directly to shield the client from major legal compliance issues.

To solve potential race conditions when patients attempt to book the exact same doctor slot simultaneously, a distributed lock utilizing Redis should be configured over slot assignments during checkout.
Baseline application scope was enforced: authentication, access control, dashboard/reporting, settings, audit logging, security, and deployment-ready traceability.
extracted.conclusion: AegisHealth Nexus presents a comprehensive, modern, and high-performance software solution for healthcare providers. Moving beyond standard workflows, it introduces automated appointment conflict resolution, secure medical records management, cryptographic audit logging, and custom-tailored workspace dashboards. By building upon this architecture, the hospital is equipped with an optimized, legally compliant, and highly scalable software core ready for clinical deployment.

features.name: Interactive Landing Dashboard
features.description: A personalized homepage showcasing key metrics, system status, interactive activity graphs, and quick actions.
acceptance_criteria: Users see a customized landing page based on their specific role.
Displays real-time system performance statistics and active counts.
Includes responsive grid layout with interactive data visualization widgets.

features.name: Custom Report Generator
features.description: Advanced query interface allowing administrators to generate, customize, and export operational reports.
acceptance_criteria: Generates reports filtering by date range, module, and user activity.
Supports exporting data in PDF and CSV format.
Saves customized report queries for future access.

features.name: User Profile Management
features.description: Allows authenticated users to view, edit, and update their personal profiles, avatars, and security preferences.
acceptance_criteria: Users can update contact info, upload avatar, and change password.
Enforces strong password complexity check during update.
Sends confirmation email upon key profile modifications.

features.name: Organization Configurations
features.description: System-wide settings for enterprise rules, notification settings, white-label configurations, and API integrations.
acceptance_criteria: System administrators can modify system name, theme, and logo.
Toggle toggleable system-wide features.
Configure SMTP email server settings and test connections.

features.name: Compliance Audit Logger
features.description: Automated background logging of all database write operations, authentication attempts, and authorization changes.
acceptance_criteria: Unalterable recording of user, IP, timestamp, action, and diff payload.
Logs are stored in an append-only archive.
Captures unauthorized access attempts immediately as critical warning flags.

features.name: Activity Log Viewer
features.description: Interactive interface for audit team members to search, filter, and inspect detailed audit trails.
acceptance_criteria: Search records by username, date range, or action type.
Export filtered query results directly into an Excel/PDF archive.
Display color-coded severity indicators for fast review.

features.name: Role-Based Dashboard
features.description: Landing dashboard with metrics, quick actions, and status widgets tailored by user role.
acceptance_criteria: Users see dashboard content relevant to their role.
Key operational metrics are visible after login.
Dashboard widgets link to primary workflows.

features.name: Report Generation & Export
features.description: Generate filtered reports and export operational data for business review.
acceptance_criteria: Users can filter report data by core business dimensions.
Reports can be exported in common formats.
Generated reports respect role permissions.

features.name: Application Configuration
features.description: Administrative configuration for organization settings, defaults, and system preferences.
acceptance_criteria: Administrators can update global settings.
System configuration changes are validated.
Critical configuration changes are audit logged.

features.name: Audit Event Logging
features.description: Capture authentication events, authorization failures, data changes, and admin actions.
acceptance_criteria: Sensitive actions create audit records.
Audit records include user, timestamp, action, and target entity.
Audit logs cannot be edited by regular users.

features.name: Patient Registration
features.description: Allow hospital staff to register new patients, capturing essential information such as name, date of birth, contact details, and medical history.
acceptance_criteria: The system shall allow hospital staff to register new patients.
The system shall validate patient information to ensure accuracy and completeness.

features.name: Doctor Profile Management
features.description: Enable doctors to manage their profiles, including updating their schedules, specialties, and contact information.
acceptance_criteria: The system shall allow doctors to update their profiles.
The system shall validate doctor information to ensure accuracy and completeness.

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Provide an administrative dashboard for hospital administrators to monitor system performance and manage user accounts.
acceptance_criteria: The system shall provide an administrative dashboard.
The system shall display system performance metrics and user account information.

features.name: Authentication and Authorization
features.description: Implement a secure authentication and authorization system to ensure only authorized personnel can access sensitive information.
acceptance_criteria: The system shall authenticate users and authorize access to sensitive information.
The system shall implement password policies and session management.

features.name: User Login & MFA
features.description: Secure user login with multi-factor authentication (MFA) and token-based session management.
acceptance_criteria: User can authenticate using password and an MFA OTP token.
System generates valid JWT sessions.
Failed attempts lock accounts after 5 consecutive failures.

features.name: User Registration & Password Recovery
features.description: Seamless self-service account registration with email verification and self-service password recovery workflows.
acceptance_criteria: User can register via a public signup page.
Activation link is sent to verified email.
Self-service password recovery with secure token verification.

features.name: Role-Based Access Control (RBAC)
features.description: Comprehensive definition of user roles and permission matrices to secure API endpoints and UI pathways.
acceptance_criteria: Administrator can assign roles to specific user accounts.
Restricted routes return 403 Forbidden for unauthorized roles.
Permissions are enforced at the API level.

features.name: User Login & Session Security
features.description: Secure login with protected sessions, failed-attempt handling, and logout controls.
acceptance_criteria: Users can log in and log out securely.
Sessions expire after inactivity.
Failed login attempts are rate-limited or locked after repeated failures.

raw_input:
PROJECT NAME: AI--demo Enterprise Engineering Platform

PROJECT OVERVIEW:
AI--demo is a simulated enterprise engineering platform designed to validate semantic software delivery intelligence, contributor analytics, architecture analysis, dependency reasoning, hotspot detection, timeline intelligence, and AI-driven engineering governance workflows.

The platform contains authentication systems, payment processing infrastructure, analytics reporting modules, notification services, testing systems, and experimental AI forecasting capabilities.

The repository intentionally contains:

* contributor handoffs,
* delayed implementations,
* incomplete features,
* architectural coupling,
* repeated hotfixes,
* delayed QA stabilization,
* and semantic delivery evolution

to test advanced AI engineering intelligence reasoning.

================================================================================
FEATURE 1: USER AUTHENTICATION SYSTEM
=====================================

FEATURE NAME:
User Authentication System

DESCRIPTION:
The authentication module must support secure login validation, user registration, and session lifecycle management for enterprise users.

BUSINESS GOAL:
Provide stable and secure access control for all platform services.

ASSIGNED DEVELOPERS:
Alice

EXPECTED TIMELINE:
Start Date: 2026-05-01
End Date: 2026-05-03

ESTIMATED HOURS:
40

PRIORITY:
High

STATUS:
In Progress

DEPENDENCIES:

* Database Layer

EXPECTED COMPONENTS:

* auth/login.py
* auth/register.py
* auth/session_manager.py

DELIVERY EXPECTATIONS:

* Stable login workflow
* Secure session creation
* User registration support
* Reliable authentication flow

KNOWN RISKS:

* Contributor ownership concentration
* Coupling with payment systems
* Authentication scalability concerns

SEMANTIC VALIDATION TARGETS:

* Ownership inference
* Contributor concentration
* Timeline validation
* Dependency analysis
* Architecture coupling detection

================================================================================
FEATURE 2: PAYMENT PROCESSING SYSTEM
====================================

FEATURE NAME:
Payment Processing System

DESCRIPTION:
The payment processing module must support transaction execution, invoice generation, retry handling, and emergency recovery workflows for failed payments.

BUSINESS GOAL:
Ensure reliable and production-ready payment infrastructure.

ASSIGNED DEVELOPERS:
Bob

EXPECTED TIMELINE:
Start Date: 2026-05-02
End Date: 2026-05-05

ESTIMATED HOURS:
60

PRIORITY:
Critical

STATUS:
Active

DEPENDENCIES:

* User Authentication System

EXPECTED COMPONENTS:

* payments/payment_service.py
* payments/invoice_generator.py

DELIVERY EXPECTATIONS:

* Stable payment execution
* Retry handling
* Operational fault recovery
* Invoice generation
* Production-grade reliability

KNOWN RISKS:

* Repeated operational hotfixes
* High churn probability
* Architectural instability
* Tight coupling risk
* Operational pressure escalation

SEMANTIC VALIDATION TARGETS:

* Hotspot detection
* Churn analysis
* Operational instability reasoning
* Risk escalation
* Dependency propagation
* Emergency fix intelligence

================================================================================
FEATURE 3: ANALYTICS REPORTING PLATFORM
=======================================

FEATURE NAME:
Analytics Reporting Platform

DESCRIPTION:
The analytics system must support enterprise metrics generation, reporting workflows, business intelligence aggregation, and future AI forecasting support.

BUSINESS GOAL:
Enable engineering and business reporting intelligence.

ASSIGNED DEVELOPERS:
Charlie

EXPECTED TIMELINE:
Start Date: 2026-05-03
End Date: 2026-05-08

ESTIMATED HOURS:
35

PRIORITY:
Medium

STATUS:
Delayed

DEPENDENCIES:

* Payment Processing System

EXPECTED COMPONENTS:

* analytics/metrics.py
* analytics/report_generator.py

DELIVERY EXPECTATIONS:

* Accurate reporting
* Stable metric calculations
* Extensible reporting architecture
* Future forecasting compatibility

KNOWN RISKS:

* Delayed forecasting capability
* Incomplete implementation risk
* Delivery slippage
* Analytics scalability limitations

SEMANTIC VALIDATION TARGETS:

* Delayed feature reasoning
* Timeline slippage
* Semantic completion analysis
* Dependency reasoning
* Forecasting incompletion detection

================================================================================
FEATURE 4: EMAIL NOTIFICATION SERVICE
=====================================

FEATURE NAME:
Email Notification Service

DESCRIPTION:
The notification service must support transactional email delivery, delayed notifications, and enterprise messaging workflows.

BUSINESS GOAL:
Provide reliable communication delivery infrastructure.

ASSIGNED DEVELOPERS:
Alice

EXPECTED TIMELINE:
Start Date: 2026-05-01
End Date: 2026-05-02

ESTIMATED HOURS:
20

PRIORITY:
Medium

STATUS:
Delayed

DEPENDENCIES:

* User Authentication System

EXPECTED COMPONENTS:

* notifications/email_service.py

DELIVERY EXPECTATIONS:

* Stable transactional messaging
* Reliable notification delivery
* User communication support

KNOWN RISKS:

* Partial implementation risk
* Contributor handoff risk
* Delayed completion possibility

SEMANTIC VALIDATION TARGETS:

* Ownership drift
* Contributor transition reasoning
* Incomplete feature analysis
* Delayed implementation detection
* Delivery handoff intelligence

================================================================================
FEATURE 5: PAYMENT QUALITY ASSURANCE
====================================

FEATURE NAME:
Payment Quality Assurance

DESCRIPTION:
The testing infrastructure must validate payment reliability, transaction consistency, and operational fault recovery.

BUSINESS GOAL:
Improve payment stability and production readiness.

ASSIGNED DEVELOPERS:
Charlie

EXPECTED TIMELINE:
Start Date: 2026-05-04
End Date: 2026-05-05

ESTIMATED HOURS:
12

PRIORITY:
High

STATUS:
Late QA

DEPENDENCIES:

* Payment Processing System

EXPECTED COMPONENTS:

* tests/test_payments.py

DELIVERY EXPECTATIONS:

* Stable payment validation
* Fault tolerance testing
* Reliability assurance

KNOWN RISKS:

* Delayed QA stabilization
* Late-stage testing introduction
* Production instability exposure

SEMANTIC VALIDATION TARGETS:

* QA delay analysis
* Stabilization reasoning
* Testing timeline validation
* Release maturity analysis

================================================================================
FEATURE 6: AI FORECASTING PROTOTYPE
===================================

FEATURE NAME:
AI Forecasting Prototype

DESCRIPTION:
The analytics platform should support experimental AI-based forecasting and predictive business reporting capabilities.

BUSINESS GOAL:
Enable future AI-native analytics intelligence.

ASSIGNED DEVELOPERS:
Alice

EXPECTED TIMELINE:
Start Date: 2026-05-10
End Date: 2026-05-11

ESTIMATED HOURS:
18

PRIORITY:
Low

STATUS:
Experimental

DEPENDENCIES:

* Analytics Reporting Platform

EXPECTED COMPONENTS:

* analytics/report_generator.py

DELIVERY EXPECTATIONS:

* Initial forecasting framework
* Extensible AI prediction support
* Experimental predictive workflows

KNOWN RISKS:

* Incomplete implementation
* Potential feature abandonment
* Experimental delivery uncertainty
* Forecasting instability

SEMANTIC VALIDATION TARGETS:

* Feature abandonment reasoning
* Incomplete implementation detection
* Experimental feature intelligence
* Predictive delivery analysis

================================================================================
GLOBAL ENGINEERING VALIDATION OBJECTIVES
========================================

This repository intentionally contains:

* contributor ownership shifts
* incomplete implementations
* delayed feature completion
* hotspot churn
* repeated operational fixes
* dependency coupling
* architectural instability
* delayed testing
* semantic delivery gaps
* feature abandonment risks
* contributor handoffs
* inactive development windows

EXPECTED AI ENGINEERING INTELLIGENCE OUTPUTS:

The platform should reason about:

* contributor ownership concentration
* delayed implementation timelines
* feature completion gaps
* delivery instability
* operational hotspots
* architectural coupling risks
* delayed testing introduction
* semantic implementation mismatches
* dependency propagation risks
* incomplete forecasting systems
* contributor transition risks
* engineering causality patterns

features.description: The notification services module must support the sending of notifications to users and contributors.
acceptance_criteria: Notifications sent to users and contributors

features.name: Testing Systems
features.description: The testing systems module must support the execution of tests on the platform.
acceptance_criteria: Tests executed successfully

features.name: Experimental AI Forecasting Capabilities
features.description: The experimental AI forecasting capabilities module must support the generation of forecasts using AI algorithms.
acceptance_criteria: Forecasts generated using AI algorithms

features.name: User Login & MFA
features.description: Secure user login with multi-factor authentication (MFA) and token-based session management.
acceptance_criteria: User can authenticate using password and an MFA OTP token.
System generates valid JWT sessions.
Failed attempts lock accounts after 5 consecutive failures.

features.name: User Registration & Password Recovery
features.description: Seamless self-service account registration with email verification and self-service password recovery workflows.
acceptance_criteria: User can register via a public signup page.
Activation link is sent to verified email.
Self-service password recovery with secure token verification.

features.name: Role-Based Access Control (RBAC)
features.description: Comprehensive definition of user roles and permission matrices to secure API endpoints and UI pathways.
acceptance_criteria: Administrator can assign roles to specific user accounts.
Restricted routes return 403 Forbidden for unauthorized roles.
Permissions are enforced at the API level.

features.name: Interactive Landing Dashboard
features.description: A personalized homepage showcasing key metrics, system status, interactive activity graphs, and quick actions.
acceptance_criteria: Users see a customized landing page based on their specific role.
Displays real-time system performance statistics and active counts.
Includes responsive grid layout with interactive data visualization widgets.

features.name: Custom Report Generator
features.description: Advanced query interface allowing administrators to generate, customize, and export operational reports.
acceptance_criteria: Generates reports filtering by date range, module, and user activity.
Supports exporting data in PDF and CSV format.
Saves customized report queries for future access.

features.name: User Profile Management
features.description: Allows authenticated users to view, edit, and update their personal profiles, avatars, and security preferences.
acceptance_criteria: Users can update contact info, upload avatar, and change password.
Enforces strong password complexity check during update.
Sends confirmation email upon key profile modifications.

features.name: Organization Configurations
features.description: System-wide settings for enterprise rules, notification settings, white-label configurations, and API integrations.
acceptance_criteria: System administrators can modify system name, theme, and logo.
Toggle toggleable system-wide features.
Configure SMTP email server settings and test connections.

features.name: Compliance Audit Logger
features.description: Automated background logging of all database write operations, authentication attempts, and authorization changes.
acceptance_criteria: Unalterable recording of user, IP, timestamp, action, and diff payload.
Logs are stored in an append-only archive.
Captures unauthorized access attempts immediately as critical warning flags.

features.name: Activity Log Viewer
features.description: Interactive interface for audit team members to search, filter, and inspect detailed audit trails.
acceptance_criteria: Search records by username, date range, or action type.
Export filtered query results directly into an Excel/PDF archive.
Display color-coded severity indicators for fast review.

features.name: User Login & Session Security
features.description: Secure login with protected sessions, failed-attempt handling, and logout controls.
acceptance_criteria: Users can log in and log out securely.
Sessions expire after inactivity.
Failed login attempts are rate-limited or locked after repeated failures.

features.name: Role-Based Dashboard
features.description: Landing dashboard with metrics, quick actions, and status widgets tailored by user role.
acceptance_criteria: Users see dashboard content relevant to their role.
Key operational metrics are visible after login.
Dashboard widgets link to primary workflows.

features.name: Report Generation & Export
features.description: Generate filtered reports and export operational data for business review.
acceptance_criteria: Users can filter report data by core business dimensions.
Reports can be exported in common formats.
Generated reports respect role permissions.

features.name: Application Configuration
features.description: Administrative configuration for organization settings, defaults, and system preferences.
acceptance_criteria: Administrators can update global settings.
System configuration changes are validated.
Critical configuration changes are audit logged.

features.name: Audit Event Logging
features.description: Capture authentication events, authorization failures, data changes, and admin actions.
acceptance_criteria: Sensitive actions create audit records.
Audit records include user, timestamp, action, and target entity.
Audit logs cannot be edited by regular users.

features.name: Patient Profile Management

features.name: Organization Configurations

features.name: Compliance Audit Logger

Logs are stored in an append-only archive.

features.name: Activity Log Viewer

features.name: Role-Based Dashboard

features.name: Application Configuration

raw_input:
Below are the CMMS requirement notes : 

Total area covered – Entire plant 
Total machines - around 100 assets 
Each aasset is identified by Asset number 
Client will share Machine list and assets details  
 
Ticketing System: 
Production personnel ( supervisor) will raise the ticket with machine details, asset number and nature of complaint 
Maintenance team will address the ticket , resolve the issue and mark it as close with exact time duration 
 
Preventive Maintenance: 
All the machines , assets 
Utility monitoring ( water , gas , electricity) IOT based data available 
Alert before one week for PM of each asset shall be provided 
Reports: Major, Minor, non-breakdown  
AMC / PM popups 
Asset Tracking – Log /history 
Spare management – list will be provided by client 
Minimum stock details are dynamic, shall be set by maintenance team specific to each asset 
 MTTR / MTTF – KPIs and dashboards 
PM % - overall resolved in a month / week etc. 
Alert for remaining machines 
Email options

extracted.normalized_text: The client requires a Computerized Maintenance Management System (CMMS) for their entire plant, covering around 100 assets. The system should have a ticketing system for maintenance requests, preventive maintenance scheduling, utility monitoring, reporting, asset tracking, spare management, and KPI tracking.
extracted.problem_statement: The client needs a comprehensive CMMS to manage maintenance activities, assets, and spare parts for their plant with 100 assets.
project_objectives: Implement a CMMS to track and manage maintenance activities
Provide a ticketing system for maintenance requests
Schedule preventive maintenance for all assets
Monitor utility usage (water, gas, electricity) with IoT-based data
Generate reports on major, minor, and non-breakdown maintenance
Track asset history and spare parts management
extracted.proposed_solution: A web-based CMMS with a modular architecture, comprising of Authentication & Access Control, Ticketing System, Preventive Maintenance, Reporting, Asset Tracking, Spare Management, and KPI Tracking modules.
extracted.executive_summary: The proposed CMMS will provide a comprehensive solution for managing maintenance activities, assets, and spare parts, enabling the client to improve efficiency and reduce downtime.

features.description: Schedule appointments for patients with doctors and staff.
acceptance_criteria: The system shall allow users to create, read, update, and delete appointments.
The system shall send reminders and notifications for upcoming appointments.

features.name: Reporting and Analytics
features.description: Provide real-time insights into hospital performance through reporting and analytics.
acceptance_criteria: The system shall display key performance indicators (KPIs) and metrics.
The system shall allow users to generate reports and analytics on hospital performance.

features.name: User Login & MFA
features.description: Secure user login with multi-factor authentication (MFA) and token-based session management.
acceptance_criteria: User can authenticate using password and an MFA OTP token.
System generates valid JWT sessions.
Failed attempts lock accounts after 5 consecutive failures.

features.name: User Registration & Password Recovery
features.description: Seamless self-service account registration with email verification and self-service password recovery workflows.
acceptance_criteria: User can register via a public signup page.
Activation link is sent to verified email.
Self-service password recovery with secure token verification.

features.name: Role-Based Access Control (RBAC)
features.description: Comprehensive definition of user roles and permission matrices to secure API endpoints and UI pathways.
acceptance_criteria: Administrator can assign roles to specific user accounts.
Restricted routes return 403 Forbidden for unauthorized roles.
Permissions are enforced at the API level.

features.name: Interactive Landing Dashboard
features.description: A personalized homepage showcasing key metrics, system status, interactive activity graphs, and quick actions.
acceptance_criteria: Users see a customized landing page based on their specific role.
Displays real-time system performance statistics and active counts.
Includes responsive grid layout with interactive data visualization widgets.

features.name: Custom Report Generator
features.description: Advanced query interface allowing administrators to generate, customize, and export operational reports.
acceptance_criteria: Generates reports filtering by date range, module, and user activity.
Supports exporting data in PDF and CSV format.
Saves customized report queries for future access.

features.name: User Profile Management
features.description: Allows authenticated users to view, edit, and update their personal profiles, avatars, and security preferences.
acceptance_criteria: Users can update contact info, upload avatar, and change password.
Enforces strong password complexity check during update.
Sends confirmation email upon key profile modifications.

features.name: Organization Configurations
features.description: System-wide settings for enterprise rules, notification settings, white-label configurations, and API integrations.
acceptance_criteria: System administrators can modify system name, theme, and logo.
Toggle toggleable system-wide features.
Configure SMTP email server settings and test connections.

features.name: Compliance Audit Logger
features.description: Automated background logging of all database write operations, authentication attempts, and authorization changes.
acceptance_criteria: Unalterable recording of user, IP, timestamp, action, and diff payload.
Logs are stored in an append-only archive.
Captures unauthorized access attempts immediately as critical warning flags.

features.name: Activity Log Viewer
features.description: Interactive interface for audit team members to search, filter, and inspect detailed audit trails.
acceptance_criteria: Search records by username, date range, or action type.
Export filtered query results directly into an Excel/PDF archive.
Display color-coded severity indicators for fast review.

features.name: User Login & Session Security
features.description: Secure login with protected sessions, failed-attempt handling, and logout controls.
acceptance_criteria: Users can log in and log out securely.
Sessions expire after inactivity.
Failed login attempts are rate-limited or locked after repeated failures.

features.name: Role-Based Dashboard
features.description: Landing dashboard with metrics, quick actions, and status widgets tailored by user role.
acceptance_criteria: Users see dashboard content relevant to their role.
Key operational metrics are visible after login.
Dashboard widgets link to primary workflows.

features.name: Report Generation & Export
features.description: Generate filtered reports and export operational data for business review.
acceptance_criteria: Users can filter report data by core business dimensions.
Reports can be exported in common formats.
Generated reports respect role permissions.

features.name: Application Configuration
features.description: Administrative configuration for organization settings, defaults, and system preferences.
acceptance_criteria: Administrators can update global settings.
System configuration changes are validated.
Critical configuration changes are audit logged.

features.name: Audit Event Logging
features.description: Capture authentication events, authorization failures, data changes, and admin actions.
acceptance_criteria: Sensitive actions create audit records.
Audit records include user, timestamp, action, and target entity.
Audit logs cannot be edited by regular users.

raw_input: The client brief describes a Hospital Management System (HMS) for Dayananda Sagar College of Engineering. The system aims to automate hospital operations, ensuring efficient management of resources, patients, and staff.

extracted.normalized_text: The client brief describes a Hospital Management System (HMS) for Dayananda Sagar College of Engineering. The system aims to automate hospital operations, ensuring efficient management of resources, patients, and staff.
extracted.problem_statement: The Hospital Management System (HMS) needs to streamline hospital operations, including patient registration, appointment scheduling, doctor-patient interactions, billing, and reporting.
project_objectives: Develop a comprehensive HMS to automate hospital operations
Improve patient care and satisfaction
Enhance operational efficiency and reduce costs
extracted.proposed_solution: A web-based HMS with modules for patient management, appointment scheduling, doctor-patient interactions, billing, and reporting. The system will have a user-friendly interface, role-based access control, and robust security features.
extracted.executive_summary: The proposed HMS will automate hospital operations, improving patient care and satisfaction while enhancing operational efficiency.

features.name: User Login & MFA
features.description: Secure user login with multi-factor authentication (MFA) and token-based session management.

features.name: User Registration & Password Recovery

features.description: Automated background logging of all database write operations, authentication attempts, and authorization changes.
acceptance_criteria: Unalterable recording of user, IP, timestamp, action, and diff payload.
Logs are stored in an append-only archive.
Captures unauthorized access attempts immediately as critical warning flags.

features.name: Activity Log Viewer

acceptance_criteria: Search records by username, date range, or action type.
Export filtered query results directly into an Excel/PDF archive.
Display color-coded severity indicators for fast review.

features.name: User Login & Session Security
features.description: Secure login with protected sessions, failed-attempt handling, and logout controls.
acceptance_criteria: Users can log in and log out securely.
Sessions expire after inactivity.
Failed login attempts are rate-limited or locked after repeated failures.

features.name: Role-Based Dashboard
features.description: Landing dashboard with metrics, quick actions, and status widgets tailored by user role.
acceptance_criteria: Users see dashboard content relevant to their role.
Key operational metrics are visible after login.
Dashboard widgets link to primary workflows.

features.name: Report Generation & Export
features.description: Generate filtered reports and export operational data for business review.
acceptance_criteria: Users can filter report data by core business dimensions.
Reports can be exported in common formats.
Generated reports respect role permissions.

features.description: Administrative configuration for organization settings, defaults, and system preferences.
acceptance_criteria: Administrators can update global settings.
System configuration changes are validated.
Critical configuration changes are audit logged.

features.description: Capture authentication events, authorization failures, data changes, and admin actions.
acceptance_criteria: Sensitive actions create audit records.
Audit records include user, timestamp, action, and target entity.
Audit logs cannot be edited by regular users.

extracted.title: MediCareHub - SRS Software Requirements Specifications

sections.title: 1. Introduction
sections.body: MediCareHub is a comprehensive Hospital Management System designed to streamline hospital operations, improving patient care and management. The system aims to manage hospital operations efficiently, including patient information, doctor schedules, appointments, and hospital resources. MediCareHub will be built with a focus on high performance, security, and scalability to meet the demands of a growing user base. The platform will comply with industry standards for security and healthcare regulations, ensuring the protection of sensitive data.

sections.title: 2. Project Modules and Features
sections.body:
The MediCareHub platform consists of the following modules:
APPOINTMENT MANAGEMENT: The Appointment Management module manages appointments and scheduling.
Features:
• Appointment Scheduling: allows patients to schedule appointments with doctors
AUDIT TRAIL & ACTIVITY LOGS: The Audit Trail & Activity Logs module captures security events, data changes, login activity, and administrative actions for traceability.
Features:
• Compliance Audit Logger: ensures compliance with healthcare regulations and standards
• Activity Log Viewer: provides a searchable table log detailing system actions, active logins, and detailed state revisions
• Audit Event Logging: logs security-sensitive actions and events
AUTHENTICATION & ACCESS CONTROL: The Authentication & Access Control module handles login, registration, password recovery, session security, and role-based access control across the application.
Features:
• User Login: allows users to log in securely
• User Registration: allows users to register and create accounts
• Role-Based Access Control (RBAC): restricts access to certain features based on user roles
• User Login & MFA: secure user login with multi-factor authentication (MFA) and token-based session management
• User Registration & Password Recovery: seamless self-service account registration with email verification and self-service password recovery workflows
BILLING AND INVENTORY MANAGEMENT: The Billing and Inventory Management module manages billing and inventory.
Features:
• Billing and Inventory Management
DASHBOARD & REPORTING: The Dashboard & Reporting module provides role-based dashboards, system summaries, exports, and reporting views for operational visibility.
Features:
• Role-based Landing Dashboards
• System Metrics
• Activity Charts
• Interactive Landing Dashboard: a personalized homepage showcasing key metrics, system status, interactive activity graphs, and quick actions
• Custom Report Generator: advanced query interface allowing administrators to generate, customize, and export operational reports
• Role-Based Dashboard: landing dashboard with metrics, quick actions, and status widgets tailored by user role
• Report Generation & Export: generate filtered reports and export operational data for business review
DOCTOR AND STAFF MANAGEMENT: The Doctor and Staff Management module manages doctor and staff profiles.
Features:
• Doctor Management
• Staff Management
PATIENT MANAGEMENT: The Patient Management module manages patient profiles and appointments.
Features:
• Patient Registration: allow patients to register and create their profiles
• Appointment Scheduling: allow patients to schedule appointments with doctors
SYSTEM SETTINGS & PROFILES: The System Settings & Profiles module supports user profile management, workspace configuration, notification preferences, and administrative settings.
Features:
• User Profile Management: allows authenticated users to view, edit, and update their personal profiles, avatars, and security preferences
• Organization Settings: system-wide settings for enterprise rules, notification settings, white-label configurations, and API integrations
• General System Configurations: administrative configuration for organization settings, defaults, and system preferences
• Application Configuration: administrative configuration for organization settings, defaults, and system preferences

sections.title: 3. UI Pages and Screen Design
sections.body:
• Login Page (Authentication & Access Control): User login page
• Dashboard (Dashboard & Reporting): Role-based dashboard
• Patient Registration Page (Patient Management): Patient registration page
• Appointment Scheduling Page (Patient Management): Appointment scheduling page
• Doctor Profile Page (Doctor and Staff Management): Doctor profile page
• Registration & Recovery Page (Authentication & Access Control): User self-registration form and secure password reset workflow interface.
• RBAC Management Settings (Authentication & Access Control): Administrator control panel to inspect and customize roles and feature permission tables.
• Report Builder Console (Dashboard & Reporting): Dynamic querying workspace to construct, preview, and download custom logs or summaries.
• User Profile Page (System Settings & Profiles): Personal account information form with active session tracking list.
• Global Settings Panel (System Settings & Profiles): System configuration screen for setting administrative thresholds and workspace preferences.
• Audit Trail Viewer (Audit Trail & Activity Logs): Searchable table log detailing system actions, active logins, and detailed state revisions.
• Role & Permission Settings (Authentication & Access Control): Admin screen for assigning roles and controlling feature access.
• System Settings Panel (System Settings & Profiles): Administrative page for managing global application configuration.

sections.title: 4. External Interface Requirements
sections.body:
The following external interfaces are required for MediCareHub:
• Integration with cloud platform for deployment
• Compliance with healthcare regulations and standards
• Secure login with multi-factor authentication (MFA) and token-based session management
• Automated background logging of all database write operations, authentication attempts, and authorization changes

sections.title: 5. Non-Functional Requirements
sections.body:
The following non-functional requirements are specified for MediCareHub:
• Performance: The system should respond within 2 seconds
• Scalability: The system should handle 1000 concurrent users
• Security: The system must enforce authenticated access, role-based authorization, secure session handling, and protection for sensitive data
• Auditability: The system must record security-sensitive actions, administrative changes, and important business events

sections.title: 6. Technologies and Design Constraints
sections.body:
The following technologies and design constraints are recommended for MediCareHub:
• Cloud deployment on AWS or Azure
• Use of containerization with Docker
• Implementation of microservices architecture
• Use of PostgreSQL or MongoDB for database management
• Implementation of role-based access control with OAuth 2.0
• Use of React or Angular for frontend development
• Implementation of automated testing with Jest or Pytest

structuredRequirements.problem_statement: The Hospital Management System (HMS) needs to be designed and developed to streamline hospital operations, including patient management, appointment scheduling, doctor and staff management, and possibly billing and inventory management.
project_objectives: Design and develop a comprehensive Hospital Management System
Improve efficiency in hospital operations
Enhance patient care and management
Streamline administrative tasks
structuredRequirements.proposed_solution: A web-based Hospital Management System with modular architecture, incorporating features for patient management, appointment scheduling, doctor and staff management, and basic billing and inventory management.
structuredRequirements.executive_summary: The proposed Hospital Management System aims to provide a comprehensive solution for managing hospital operations. It will have modules for patient management, appointment scheduling, doctor and staff management, and basic billing and inventory management.

features.name: Patient Registration
features.description: Allow patients to register and create their profiles
acceptance_criteria: Patient can register with basic details
Patient can upload required documents

features.name: Appointment Scheduling
features.description: Allow patients to schedule appointments with doctors
acceptance_criteria: Patient can schedule an appointment with a doctor
Doctor can view and manage their appointments

features.name: Doctor Management
features.description: Allow administrators to manage doctor profiles
acceptance_criteria: Administrator can add, edit, and delete doctor profiles
Doctor profile includes basic details and specialties

features.name: Staff Management
features.description: Allow administrators to manage staff profiles
acceptance_criteria: Administrator can add, edit, and delete staff profiles
Staff profile includes basic details and role

features.name: Billing and Inventory Management
features.description: Allow administrators to manage billing and inventory
acceptance_criteria: Administrator can generate bills for patients
Administrator can manage inventory of medicines and equipment

features.name: User Login & MFA
features.description: Secure user login with multi-factor authentication (MFA) and token-based session management.
acceptance_criteria: User can authenticate using password and an MFA OTP token.
System generates valid JWT sessions.
Failed attempts lock accounts after 5 consecutive failures.

features.name: User Registration & Password Recovery
features.description: Seamless self-service account registration with email verification and self-service password recovery workflows.
acceptance_criteria: User can register via a public signup page.
Activation link is sent to verified email.
Self-service password recovery with secure token verification.

features.name: Role-Based Access Control (RBAC)
features.description: Comprehensive definition of user roles and permission matrices to secure API endpoints and UI pathways.
acceptance_criteria: Administrator can assign roles to specific user accounts.
Restricted routes return 403 Forbidden for unauthorized roles.
Permissions are enforced at the API level.

features.name: Interactive Landing Dashboard
features.description: A personalized homepage showcasing key metrics, system status, interactive activity graphs, and quick actions.
acceptance_criteria: Users see a customized landing page based on their specific role.
Displays real-time system performance statistics and active counts.
Includes responsive grid layout with interactive data visualization widgets.

features.name: Custom Report Generator
features.description: Advanced query interface allowing administrators to generate, customize, and export operational reports.
acceptance_criteria: Generates reports filtering by date range, module, and user activity.
Supports exporting data in PDF and CSV format.
Saves customized report queries for future access.

features.name: User Profile Management
features.description: Allows authenticated users to view, edit, and update their personal profiles, avatars, and security preferences.
acceptance_criteria: Users can update contact info, upload avatar, and change password.
Enforces strong password complexity check during update.
Sends confirmation email upon key profile modifications.

features.name: Organization Configurations
features.description: System-wide settings for enterprise rules, notification settings, white-label configurations, and API integrations.
acceptance_criteria: System administrators can modify system name, theme, and logo.
Toggle toggleable system-wide features.
Configure SMTP email server settings and test connections.

features.name: Compliance Audit Logger
features.description: Automated background logging of all database write operations, authentication attempts, and authorization changes.
acceptance_criteria: Unalterable recording of user, IP, timestamp, action, and diff payload.
Logs are stored in an append-only archive.
Captures unauthorized access attempts immediately as critical warning flags.

features.name: Activity Log Viewer
features.description: Interactive interface for audit team members to search, filter, and inspect detailed audit trails.
acceptance_criteria: Search records by username, date range, or action type.
Export filtered query results directly into an Excel/PDF archive.
Display color-coded severity indicators for fast review.

features.name: User Login & Session Security
features.description: Secure login with protected sessions, failed-attempt handling, and logout controls.
acceptance_criteria: Users can log in and log out securely.
Sessions expire after inactivity.
Failed login attempts are rate-limited or locked after repeated failures.

features.name: Role-Based Dashboard
features.description: Landing dashboard with metrics, quick actions, and status widgets tailored by user role.
acceptance_criteria: Users see dashboard content relevant to their role.
Key operational metrics are visible after login.
Dashboard widgets link to primary workflows.

features.name: Report Generation & Export
features.description: Generate filtered reports and export operational data for business review.
acceptance_criteria: Users can filter report data by core business dimensions.
Reports can be exported in common formats.
Generated reports respect role permissions.

features.name: Application Configuration
features.description: Administrative configuration for organization settings, defaults, and system preferences.
acceptance_criteria: Administrators can update global settings.
System configuration changes are validated.
Critical configuration changes are audit logged.

features.name: Audit Event Logging
features.description: Capture authentication events, authorization failures, data changes, and admin actions.
acceptance_criteria: Sensitive actions create audit records.
Audit records include user, timestamp, action, and target entity.
Audit logs cannot be edited by regular users.

modules.name: Audit Trail & Activity Logs
modules.summary: Captures security events, data changes, login activity, and administrative actions for traceability.

modules.name: Authentication & Access Control
modules.summary: Handles login, registration, password recovery, session security, and role-based access control across the application.

modules.name: Billing and Inventory Management
modules.summary: Manages billing and inventory

modules.name: Dashboard & Reporting
modules.summary: Provides role-based dashboards, system summaries, exports, and reporting views for operational visibility.

modules.name: Doctor and Staff Management
modules.summary: Manages doctor and staff profiles

modules.name: Patient Management
modules.summary: Manages patient profiles and appointments

modules.name: System Settings & Profiles
modules.summary: Supports user profile management, workspace configuration, notification preferences, and administrative settings.

backend_jobs.name: Send Appointment Reminders
backend_jobs.description: Send reminders to patients for upcoming appointments

Comply with healthcare regulations and standards

The system should handle 1000 concurrent users
The system must enforce authenticated access, role-based authorization, secure session handling, and protection for sensitive data.
non_functional_requirements.measurable_target: 100% of protected pages and APIs require authorization checks before access.

non_functional_requirements.description: The system must record security-sensitive actions, administrative changes, and important business events.
non_functional_requirements.measurable_target: Critical user and admin actions are logged with actor, timestamp, action, and target record.

raw_input: The client brief is an internship report on a Hospital Management System (HMS) submitted by a student of Dayananda Sagar College of Engineering. The report includes details about the college, the department of Electronics and Communication Engineering, and the internship carried out at Axcend Automation and Software Solutions Pvt Ltd.

extracted.title: EHospital - SRS Software Requirements Specifications

sections.title: 1. Introduction
sections.body: EHospital is a comprehensive Hospital Management System designed to streamline hospital operations, improving patient care and management. The system aims to manage hospital operations efficiently, including patient information, doctor schedules, appointments, and hospital resources. EHospital will be built with a focus on high performance, security, and scalability to meet the demands of a growing user base. The platform will comply with industry standards for security and healthcare regulations, ensuring the protection of sensitive data.

sections.title: 2. Project Modules and Features
sections.body:
The EHospital platform consists of the following modules:
APPOINTMENT MANAGEMENT MODULE: 
The Appointment Management module manages appointments and scheduling.
Features:
• Appointment Scheduling: allows patients to schedule appointments with doctors
• Appointment Rescheduling: allows patients to reschedule appointments
• Appointment Cancellation: allows patients to cancel appointments
AUDIT TRAIL & ACTIVITY LOGS:
The Audit Trail & Activity Logs module captures security events, data changes, login activity, and administrative actions for traceability.
Features:
• Compliance Audit Logger: ensures compliance with healthcare regulations and standards
• Activity Log Viewer: provides a searchable table log detailing system actions, active logins, and detailed state revisions
• Audit Event Logging: logs security-sensitive actions and events
AUTHENTICATION & ACCESS CONTROL:
The Authentication & Access Control module handles login, registration, password recovery, session security, and role-based access control across the application.
Features:
• User Login: allows users to log in securely
• User Registration: allows users to register and create accounts
• Role-Based Access Control (RBAC): restricts access to certain features based on user roles
• User Login & MFA: secure user login with multi-factor authentication (MFA) and token-based session management
• User Registration & Password Recovery: seamless self-service account registration with email verification and self-service password recovery workflows
BILLING MANAGEMENT:
The Billing Management module manages billing.
Features:
• Invoice Generation: generates invoices for patients
• Payment Tracking: tracks payments made by patients
DASHBOARD & REPORTING:
The Dashboard & Reporting module aggregates real-time activities and compiles customized performance reports, analytics charts, and visual dashboards.
Features:
• Interactive Landing Dashboard: a personalized homepage showcasing key metrics, system status, interactive activity graphs, and quick actions
• Custom Report Generator: advanced query interface allowing administrators to generate, customize, and export operational reports
• Role-Based Dashboard: landing dashboard with metrics, quick actions, and status widgets tailored by user role
• Report Generation & Export: generate filtered reports and export operational data for business review
INVENTORY MANAGEMENT:
The Inventory Management module manages inventory.
Features:
• Stock Level Tracking: tracks stock levels of medical supplies
• Supply Ordering: allows hospital staff to order supplies
MEDICAL RECORD MANAGEMENT:
The Medical Record Management module manages medical records.
Features:
• Medical Record Storage: stores medical records of patients
• Medical Record Retrieval: retrieves medical records of patients
PATIENT MANAGEMENT:
The Patient Management module manages patient information.
Features:
• Patient Registration: allows patients to register
• Patient Profile Management: allows hospital staff to manage patient information
SYSTEM SETTINGS & PROFILES:
The System Settings & Profiles module allows users to personalize settings and administrators to adjust global parameters, localization, and system operations.
Features:
• User Profile Management: allows authenticated users to view, edit, and update their personal profiles, avatars, and security preferences
• Organization Configurations: system-wide settings for enterprise rules, notification settings, white-label configurations, and API integrations
• Application Configuration: administrative configuration for organization settings, defaults, and system preferences

sections.title: 3. UI Pages and Screen Design
sections.body:
• Login Page (Authentication & Access Control): This page will allow users to log in to the system.
• Patient Profile Page (Patient Management): This page will display patient information.
• Appointment Schedule Page (Appointment Management): This page will display appointment schedules.
• Medical Record Page (Medical Record Management): This page will display medical records.
• Billing Page (Billing Management): This page will display billing information.
• Inventory Page (Inventory Management): This page will display inventory information.
• Registration & Recovery Page (Authentication & Access Control): User self-registration form and secure password reset workflow interface.
• RBAC Management Settings (Authentication & Access Control): Administrator control panel to inspect and customize roles and feature permission tables.
• Executive Dashboard (Dashboard & Reporting): Unified console presenting aggregated analytics, quick widgets, and direct workflow shortcuts.
• Report Builder Console (Dashboard & Reporting): Dynamic querying workspace to construct, preview, and download custom logs or summaries.
• User Profile Page (System Settings & Profiles): Personal account information form with active session tracking list.
• Global Settings Panel (System Settings & Profiles): System configuration screen for setting administrative thresholds and workspace preferences.
• Audit Trail Viewer (Audit Trail & Activity Logs): Searchable table log detailing system actions, active logins, and detailed state revisions.
• Role & Permission Settings (Authentication & Access Control): Admin screen for assigning roles and controlling feature access.
• System Settings Panel (System Settings & Profiles): Administrative page for managing global application configuration.

sections.title: 4. External Interface Requirements
sections.body:
EHospital will integrate with the following external systems:
• Payment Gateway: EHospital will integrate with a payment gateway to process payments.
• Insurance API: EHospital will integrate with an insurance API to verify patient insurance coverage.
• Laboratory Information System: EHospital will integrate with a laboratory information system to retrieve laboratory results.
• Radiology Information System: EHospital will integrate with a radiology information system to retrieve radiology results.
EHospital will use the following communication protocols:
• HTTPS: EHospital will use HTTPS to encrypt data transmitted between the application and external systems.
• HL7: EHospital will use HL7 to exchange healthcare data with external systems.
EHospital will use the following data formats:
• JSON: EHospital will use JSON to exchange data with external systems.
• XML: EHospital will use XML to exchange data with external systems.

sections.title: 5. Non-Functional Requirements
sections.body:
EHospital shall meet the following non-functional requirements:
• Security: Ensure application security and compliance (Target: 100% secure).
• Performance: Optimize application performance (Target: Sub-2s response time).
• Auditability: Keep detailed audit trails (Target: Full action history).
• Scalability: The system must be able to handle a growing customer base (Target: Handle 1000 concurrent users).
• Usability: The user interface should be intuitive and easy to navigate for both customers and administrators (Target: User testing confirms task completion rate > 90% for core journeys).
• Maintainability: Codebase should be well-structured, documented, and employ consistent coding standards to facilitate future updates within the limited time (Target: Code coverage > 70% for critical backend logic).
• Reliability & Uptime: Core scheduling systems and booking interfaces must remain available to ensure continuous clinic access (Target: 99.9% application uptime).
• UI Page Load Performance: Frontend performance must optimize bundle footprints to deliver snappy view updates and prompt booking confirmations (Target: API endpoints respond in under 300ms; frontend visual loading under 1.5 seconds under normal loads).

sections.title: 6. Technologies and Design Constraints
sections.body:
The following technologies are recommended for EHospital:
• Frontend: React.js or Angular.js for building a responsive and interactive user interface.
• Backend: Node.js or Django for building a scalable and secure backend API.
• Database: PostgreSQL or MongoDB for storing and retrieving data.
• Containerization: Docker for containerizing the application.
• Orchestration: Kubernetes for orchestrating the containers.
• Security: OAuth or OpenID Connect for authentication and authorization.
The following design constraints are applicable to EHospital:
• Cloud Deployment: EHospital will be deployed on a cloud-based infrastructure.
• Compliance: EHospital must comply with relevant healthcare regulations, such as HIPAA.

structuredRequirements.problem_statement: The problem statement is to design and develop a Hospital Management System (HMS) that can manage the daily activities of a hospital.
project_objectives: To develop a comprehensive HMS that can manage patient information, appointments, and medical records.
To automate the hospital's administrative tasks, such as billing and inventory management.
To provide a user-friendly interface for hospital staff to access and update patient information.
structuredRequirements.proposed_solution: The proposed solution is a web-based HMS that can be accessed by hospital staff and patients. The system will have the following modules: patient management, appointment management, medical record management, billing management, and inventory management.
recommended_technologies: PostgreSQL as the database management system
recommended_tools: Visual Studio Code as the integrated development environment
Jenkins for continuous integration and deployment
structuredRequirements.executive_summary: The EHospital system will be a comprehensive HMS that can manage patient information, appointments, and medical records. The system will have a user-friendly interface and will automate the hospital's administrative tasks.

extracted.title: Hospital Management system - SRS Software Requirements Specifications

sections.title: 1. Introduction
sections.body: Hospital Management system is a comprehensive Hospital Management System (HMS) website designed to cater to three distinct user roles: admin, doctor, and patient. The system consists of four primary modules: admin, doctor, patient, and authentication. The purpose of Hospital Management system is to provide a role-based HMS website with secure authentication and authorization, while ensuring data encryption and secure access to features based on user roles.

sections.title: 2. Project Modules and Features
sections.body:
The following modules and their features are included in Hospital Management system:
• Admin: 
  The Admin module provides features for the admin role.
  Purpose: Manage patient records and medical history.
  Features:
  • Patient Record Management: Allow admins to manage patient records.
  • Medical History Management: Allow admins to manage medical history.
• Authentication: 
  The Authentication module handles login, registration, password recovery, session security, and role-based access control across the application.
  Purpose: Secure user access and control.
  Features:
  • User Registration: Allow users to register with their details.
  • User Login: Allow registered users to log in securely.
  • Role-Based Access Control: Restrict access to features based on user roles.
• Doctor: 
  The Doctor module provides features for the doctor role.
  Purpose: Manage patient records and medical history.
  Features:
  • Patient Record Management: Allow doctors to manage patient records.
  • Medical History Management: Allow doctors to manage medical history.
• Patient: 
  The Patient module provides features for the patient role.
  Purpose: Allow patients to view their records.
  Features:
  • View Patient Records: Allow patients to view their patient records.
  • View Medical History: Allow patients to view their medical history.

sections.title: 3. UI Pages and Screen Design
sections.body:
• Login Page (Authentication): User login page
• Registration Page (Authentication): User registration page
• Admin Dashboard (Admin): Admin dashboard page
• Doctor Dashboard (Doctor): Doctor dashboard page
• Patient Dashboard (Patient): Patient dashboard page
• Registration & Recovery Page (Authentication): User self-registration form and secure password reset workflow interface.
• RBAC Management Settings (Authentication): Administrator control panel to inspect and customize roles and feature permission tables.
• Role & Permission Settings (Authentication): Admin screen for assigning roles and controlling feature access.

sections.title: 4. External Interface Requirements
sections.body: A comprehensive HMS website with role-based access control and secure authentication

sections.title: 5. Non-Functional Requirements
sections.body:
The following non-functional requirements are specified for Hospital Management system:
• Scalability: The system should handle increased traffic and user base, with a target of handling 1000 concurrent users.
• Security: The system must enforce authenticated access, role-based authorization, secure session handling, and protection for sensitive data, with a target of 100% of protected pages and APIs requiring authorization checks before access.
• Auditability: The system must record security-sensitive actions, administrative changes, and important business events, with a target of critical user and admin actions being logged with actor, timestamp, action, and target record.

sections.title: 6. Technologies and Design Constraints
sections.body:
The following technologies and design constraints are recommended for Hospital Management system:
• Frontend: React.js or Angular for building reusable UI components.
• Backend: Node.js with Express.js for creating RESTful APIs.
• Database: PostgreSQL for relational data storage and MongoDB for NoSQL data storage.
• Authentication: OAuth 2.0 for secure authentication and authorization.
• Deployment: Cloud-based deployment on AWS or Google Cloud Platform.
• Security: Implement SSL/TLS encryption for secure data transmission.

extracted.title: Hospital Management System - SRS Software Requirements Specifications

sections.title: 1. Introduction
sections.body: The  Hospital Management System (HMS) is a comprehensive platform designed to manage hospital operations efficiently. It caters to three distinct user roles: Admin, Doctor, and Patient. The system consists of four primary modules: Admin, Doctor, Patient, and Authentication. The purpose of HMS is to provide a role-based system with secure authentication and authorization, ensuring data encryption and secure access to features based on user roles.

sections.title: 2. Project Modules and Features
sections.body:
The  Hospital Management System consists of the following modules:
Admin: The Admin module provides features for managing hospital operations.
Purpose: Manage patient records and hospital operations.
Features:
• Patient Management: Allow admins to manage patient details.
Authentication: The Authentication module handles login, registration, password recovery, session security, and role-based access control.
Purpose: Secure user access and control.
Features:
• User Registration: Allow users to register with their details.
• User Login: Allow registered users to log in securely.
• Role-Based Access Control: Restrict access to features based on user roles.
Doctor: The Doctor module provides features for doctors to manage patient care.
Purpose: Manage patient care and records.
Features:
• Patient Management: Allow doctors to manage patient details.
Patient: The Patient module provides features for patients to manage their care.
Purpose: Allow patients to view and manage their care.
Features:
• Patient Management: Allow patients to view their patient details.

sections.title: 3. UI Pages and Screen Design
sections.body:
• Admin Dashboard (Admin): Provide an overview of hospital operations
• Doctor Dashboard (Doctor): Provide an overview of patient care
• Patient Dashboard (Patient): Provide an overview of patient care
• Login Page (Authentication): Allow users to log in securely
• Registration Page (Authentication): Allow users to register with their details
• Registration & Recovery Page (Authentication): User self-registration form and secure password reset workflow interface.
• RBAC Management Settings (Authentication): Administrator control panel to inspect and customize roles and feature permission tables.
• Role & Permission Settings (Authentication): Admin screen for assigning roles and controlling feature access.

sections.title: 4. External Interface Requirements
sections.body:
The  Hospital Management System requires the following external interface requirements:
• Integration with a secure payment gateway for payment processing.
• Compliance with healthcare regulations and standards for data security and privacy.
• Integration with a notification service for sending alerts and reminders.
• Integration with a reporting service for generating custom reports.
• Deployment on a cloud-based infrastructure for scalability and reliability.

sections.title: 5. Non-Functional Requirements
sections.body:
The  Hospital Management System has the following non-functional requirements:
• Performance: The system should respond within 2 seconds.
• Scalability: The system should support 1000 users.
• Security: The system must enforce authenticated access, role-based authorization, secure session handling, and protection for sensitive data.
• Auditability: The system must record security-sensitive actions, administrative changes, and important business events.
• Usability: The system should provide an intuitive and user-friendly interface for all users.

sections.title: 6. Technologies and Design Constraints
sections.body:
The  Hospital Management System will be built using the following technologies:
• Frontend: React.js for a responsive and interactive user interface.
• Backend: Node.js with Express.js for a scalable and secure server-side application.
• Database: PostgreSQL for a reliable and secure relational database.
• Authentication: OAuth 2.0 for secure authentication and authorization.
• Deployment: Amazon Web Services (AWS) for a scalable and reliable cloud infrastructure.
• Security: SSL/TLS encryption for secure data transmission.

extracted.title: Hospital Management System  - SRS Software Requirements Specifications

sections.title: 1. Introduction
sections.body: The  Hospital Management System (HMS) is a comprehensive platform designed to manage hospital operations efficiently. It caters to three distinct user roles: Admin, Doctor, and Patient. The system consists of four primary modules: Admin, Doctor, Patient, and Authentication. The purpose of HMS is to provide a role-based system with secure authentication and authorization, ensuring data encryption and secure access to features based on user roles.

sections.title: 2. Project Modules and Features
sections.body:
The  Hospital Management System consists of the following modules:
Admin: The Admin module provides features for managing hospital operations.
Purpose: Manage patient records and hospital operations.
Features:
• Patient Management: Allow admins to manage patient details.
Authentication: The Authentication module handles login, registration, password recovery, session security, and role-based access control.
Purpose: Secure user access and control.
Features:
• User Registration: Allow users to register with their details.
• User Login: Allow registered users to log in securely.
• Role-Based Access Control: Restrict access to features based on user roles.
Doctor: The Doctor module provides features for doctors to manage patient care.
Purpose: Manage patient care and records.
Features:
• Patient Management: Allow doctors to manage patient details.
Patient: The Patient module provides features for patients to manage their care.
Purpose: Allow patients to view and manage their care.
Features:
• Patient Management: Allow patients to view their patient details.

sections.title: 3. UI Pages and Screen Design
sections.body:
• Admin Dashboard (Admin): Provide an overview of hospital operations
• Doctor Dashboard (Doctor): Provide an overview of patient care
• Patient Dashboard (Patient): Provide an overview of patient care
• Login Page (Authentication): Allow users to log in securely
• Registration Page (Authentication): Allow users to register with their details
• Registration & Recovery Page (Authentication): User self-registration form and secure password reset workflow interface.
• RBAC Management Settings (Authentication): Administrator control panel to inspect and customize roles and feature permission tables.
• Role & Permission Settings (Authentication): Admin screen for assigning roles and controlling feature access.

sections.title: 4. External Interface Requirements
sections.body:
The  Hospital Management System requires the following external interface requirements:
• Integration with a secure payment gateway for payment processing.
• Compliance with healthcare regulations and standards for data security and privacy.
• Integration with a notification service for sending alerts and reminders.
• Integration with a reporting service for generating custom reports.
• Deployment on a cloud-based infrastructure for scalability and reliability.

sections.title: 5. Non-Functional Requirements
sections.body:
The  Hospital Management System has the following non-functional requirements:
• Performance: The system should respond within 2 seconds.
• Scalability: The system should support 1000 users.
• Security: The system must enforce authenticated access, role-based authorization, secure session handling, and protection for sensitive data.
• Auditability: The system must record security-sensitive actions, administrative changes, and important business events.
• Usability: The system should provide an intuitive and user-friendly interface for all users.

sections.title: 6. Technologies and Design Constraints
sections.body:
The  Hospital Management System will be built using the following technologies:
• Frontend: React.js for a responsive and interactive user interface.
• Backend: Node.js with Express.js for a scalable and secure server-side application.
• Database: PostgreSQL for a reliable and secure relational database.
• Authentication: OAuth 2.0 for secure authentication and authorization.
• Deployment: Amazon Web Services (AWS) for a scalable and reliable cloud infrastructure.
• Security: SSL/TLS encryption for secure data transmission.

extracted.title: Hospital Management System - SRS Software Requirements Specifications - SRS Software Requirements Specifications - SRS Software Requirements Specifications - SRS Software Requirements Specifications

sections.title: 1. Introduction
sections.body: The  Hospital Management System (HMS) is a comprehensive platform designed to manage hospital operations efficiently. It caters to three distinct user roles: Admin, Doctor, and Patient. The system consists of four primary modules: Admin, Doctor, Patient, and Authentication. The purpose of HMS is to provide a role-based system with secure authentication and authorization, ensuring data encryption and secure access to features based on user roles.

sections.title: 2. Project Modules and Features
sections.body:
The  Hospital Management System consists of the following modules:
Admin: The Admin module provides features for managing hospital operations.
Purpose: Manage patient records and hospital operations.
Features:
• Patient Management: Allow admins to manage patient details.
Authentication: The Authentication module handles login, registration, password recovery, session security, and role-based access control.
Purpose: Secure user access and control.
Features:
• User Registration: Allow users to register with their details.
• User Login: Allow registered users to log in securely.
• Role-Based Access Control: Restrict access to features based on user roles.
Doctor: The Doctor module provides features for doctors to manage patient care.
Purpose: Manage patient care and records.
Features:
• Patient Management: Allow doctors to manage patient details.
Patient: The Patient module provides features for patients to manage their care.
Purpose: Allow patients to view and manage their care.
Features:
• Patient Management: Allow patients to view their patient details.

sections.title: 3. UI Pages and Screen Design
sections.body:
• Admin Dashboard (Admin): Provide an overview of hospital operations
• Doctor Dashboard (Doctor): Provide an overview of patient care
• Patient Dashboard (Patient): Provide an overview of patient care
• Login Page (Authentication): Allow users to log in securely
• Registration Page (Authentication): Allow users to register with their details
• Registration & Recovery Page (Authentication): User self-registration form and secure password reset workflow interface.
• RBAC Management Settings (Authentication): Administrator control panel to inspect and customize roles and feature permission tables.
• Role & Permission Settings (Authentication): Admin screen for assigning roles and controlling feature access.

sections.title: 4. External Interface Requirements
sections.body:
The  Hospital Management System requires the following external interface requirements:
• Integration with a secure payment gateway for payment processing.
• Compliance with healthcare regulations and standards for data security and privacy.
• Integration with a notification service for sending alerts and reminders.
• Integration with a reporting service for generating custom reports.
• Deployment on a cloud-based infrastructure for scalability and reliability.

sections.title: 5. Non-Functional Requirements
sections.body:
The  Hospital Management System has the following non-functional requirements:
• Performance: The system should respond within 2 seconds.
• Scalability: The system should support 1000 users.
• Security: The system must enforce authenticated access, role-based authorization, secure session handling, and protection for sensitive data.
• Auditability: The system must record security-sensitive actions, administrative changes, and important business events.
• Usability: The system should provide an intuitive and user-friendly interface for all users.

sections.title: 6. Technologies and Design Constraints
sections.body:
The  Hospital Management System will be built using the following technologies:
• Frontend: React.js for a responsive and interactive user interface.
• Backend: Node.js with Express.js for a scalable and secure server-side application.
• Database: PostgreSQL for a reliable and secure relational database.
• Authentication: OAuth 2.0 for secure authentication and authorization.
• Deployment: Amazon Web Services (AWS) for a scalable and reliable cloud infrastructure.
• Security: SSL/TLS encryption for secure data transmission.
